Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class DeployRequest

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.DeployRequest
public class DeployRequest extends SObject

Java class for DeployRequest complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DeployRequest">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AllowMissingFiles" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AutoUpdatePackage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanceledBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanceledById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChangeSetName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CheckOnly" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CompletedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeployTestResults" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ErrorMessage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ErrorStatusCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IgnoreWarnings" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberComponentErrors" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberComponentsDeployed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberComponentsTotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberTestErrors" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberTestsCompleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberTestsTotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PurgeOnDelete" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RollbackOnError" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RunTestsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SinglePackage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StateDetail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TestLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
